name: Gold Cake (the Basic Crockpot Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set crockpot to High 20 minutes before beginning.
2. Place a liner in the 8-cup capacity baking tin.
3. Butter and flour the baking tin.
4. Mix together the flour, cream of tartar, and salt; set aside.
5. Cream the butter until smooth.
6. Gradually add sugar, vanilla, and mace to the butter mixture. Beat until fluffy.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating for one minute after each addition.
8. Blend in the flour mixture; do not overmix.
9. Pour batter into the prepared tin and cover with lid or a terry towel.
10. Place the tin in the crockpot and cover it.
11. Bake on High for 3 hours or until the cake begins to pull away from the sides of the pan.
12. Remove the lid; let stand in the tin on a cake rack for about 10 minutes.
13. Turn out the cake onto a serving plate and dust with confectioners' sugar.
14. Slice and serve.
Two secrets for baking in a crockpot: use less than 1 cup of sugar for every 2 cups of flour, and always use a liner (kitchen parchment is available in most department store housewares sections; it's reusable and prevents food from sticking). If you prefer, you can substitute buttered or oiled brown grocery paper.
